notes:
## What's Changed
* docs(adr): supersede ADR-0005 with non-empty-password decision by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2262
* ci(npm): make all npm publishing maintainer-local by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2275
* ci(release): require RELEASE_DISPATCH_TOKEN to cascade release events by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2277
* fix(desktop): rename .app.tar.gz per arch + don't make desktop release latest by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2278
* Update Swift Package.swift to v0.3.0 by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2273
* chore(deps): bump actions/setup-node from 6.3.0 to 6.4.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2266
* chore(deps): bump ruby/setup-ruby from 1.302.0 to 1.305.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2272
* chore(deps): bump cachix/install-nix-action from 31.10.4 to 31.10.5 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2270

* fix(ui-web): apply viewport flex chain to mount root by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2281
* ci(readme-smoke): cover desktop cask + move snippet into Installation by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2282
* feat(desktop): fill out native menu (About / Preferences / Window / Help) by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2283
* feat(render-html): body-only HTML export + render_html_css() (Step 1 of #2279) by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2284
* fix(vscode-extension): body-only render preview, eliminate lyric baseline drift (#2279 Step 2) by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2285
* refactor(react): drop unknown bridge cast in chord-diagram loader by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2286
* ci(macports): refresh Portfile + add Cargo.lock drift guard (#1615) by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2287

* feat(chordpro): add settings.strict and missing-{key} warning (#2292) by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2293
* fix(render-pdf): adjacent-dedup ToC entries (#2294) by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2295
* feat(render-html): add settings.wraplines (#2296) by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2297
* feat(chordpro): add Charango instrument voicings (#2298) by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2299
* feat(chordpro): keys.force-common / keys.flats config + canonicalizer (#2300) by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2301
* feat(chordpro): transposable {chord: [X]} / {define: [X]} (#2302) by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2303
* docs(adr): close R6.100.0 — ADR-0010 / ADR-0011 + upstream-version bump by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2304
* chore(gitignore): ignore .playwright-mcp/ scratch dir by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2306
* feat(desktop): file I/O keyboard shortcuts (Cmd/Ctrl+O/S/Shift+S) by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2307
* ci: restrict rust-cache save-if to main to fix 10GB cache cap thrash by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2309
* ci(python): disable sccache for Linux + Windows wheel builds (0% hit rate) by @unchidev in https://github.com/koedame/chordsketch/pull/2311
